name: Monterey Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chopped spinach -- thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti.
2. Meanwhile, beat egg in a medium bowl.
3. Add sour cream, Parmesan cheese, and garlic powder to the beaten egg.
4. Drain spaghetti, then add it to the egg mixture with Monterey Jack cheese, spinach, and half of the onions.
5. Pour into a greased 2-quart baking dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
6. Top with remaining onions; return to the oven uncovered for 5 minutes or until onions are golden brown.
